title: Ore UI-ify
description: Imagined Bedrock's Ore UI experience in Minecraft: Java. Includes new GUIs and new containers from reference material.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33b17779964dbccccbe159e76ecc4df0b952aaa0.png)

# ![gallery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e80264a3641e2e1ee6fdd2a13a02d61463e29e5.png)

Ore UI-ify is a resource pack that trys to emulate Bedrock's Ore UI look and feel by retexturing many of Minecraft: Java Edition's screens, icons & texts, buttons, and containers.

Requires 1.21.4+ and [**OptiGUI**](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) to experience the retextured Ender Chest, Barrel, and colored Shulker Boxes.
At the moment, this pack only supports English.

<details>
<summary>DISCLAIMER</summary>
Many of the containers not featured in the latest Ore UI leak have not been fully themed. But as a placeholders, they have been textured with the default grey container theme. This will change as Mojang reveals more of the new container GUIs.
</details>


NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT.
